verdicts.note: 'Prioritizing taxpayer dollars' is a vague stewardship phrase, and 'reducing burdens on small businesses' is a tax/regulation point, not a spending-oversight position. No audit, oversight, or restraint-before-spending content in the dossier; the lean is an indirect inference from one pamphlet fragment.

The plank ('returning decision-making to local communities') states the pole_a thesis, so direction and medium confidence hold, but it is a single pamphlet phrase with no specifics (no GMA, zoning-mandate, or consolidation positions). Full-pole -2 cannot rest on one unspecific sentence; -1 is what the evidence supports.
